verses.text: Joshua the high priest stands before the angel, with Satan to resist him; 'The LORD rebuke thee'; is not this 'a brand plucked out of the fire'? Accuser silenced. God Himself answers the charges against His own.

Joshua the high priest stands before the angel, with Satan to resist him; 'The LORD rebuke thee'; is not this 'a brand plucked out of the fire'? Accuser silenced. God Himself answers the charges against His own.
Joshua's filthy garments are removed, and he is clothed with 'change of raiment' and a fair mitre. Righteousness given. God strips away guilt and clothes His servant with His own righteousness.
Joshua's filthy garments are removed, and he is clothed with 'change of raiment' and a fair mitre. Righteousness given. God strips away guilt and clothes His servant with His own righteousness.
Joshua's filthy garments are removed, and he is clothed with 'change of raiment' and a fair mitre. Righteousness given. God strips away guilt and clothes His servant with His own righteousness.
The angel charges Joshua: walk in My ways, and thou shalt judge My house and walk among these that stand by. Privilege with duty. Cleansing is joined to a call to faithful service.
The angel charges Joshua: walk in My ways, and thou shalt judge My house and walk among these that stand by. Privilege with duty. Cleansing is joined to a call to faithful service.

Hear, O Joshua: 'I will bring forth my servant the BRANCH'; behold the stone with seven eyes; 'I will remove the iniquity of that land in one day.' The Messiah. Christ, the Branch, would take away sin in a single day at the cross.
